name: Tinplate
bio:
Mechanical Gargoyle Guardian of the Net of Secrets, created by a genius engineer to protect humans and the Net of Secrets from external threats.

Role: Taunt Protection
Specialty: A frontline Protection-type hero that can protect allies and taunt enemy units; triggers a Counterattack when attacked.

skillSlots.name: Shield Support
skillSlots.description: Enters [Shield Support] Status: DEF increased by 30%, Crit DMG RED increased by 20%; protects highest ATK and lowest DEF ally heroes by sharing 40% of their received DMG for 2 turns (undispellable).

skillSlots.name: Roadbreaking Shield
skillSlots.description: Attacks the column containing enemy with highest crit rate, dealing 280% P.DMG with 80% probability to inflict [Taunt].

effects.name: Shield Bash DEF
effects.description: Triggers [Reflection] when attacked, dealing 200% of Tinplate's DEF as P.DMG to attacker.

effects.name: Shield Bash DEF
effects.description: 50% probability to apply 1 stack of [Infect] to attacker when hit (max 3 triggers per turn).

effects.name: Shield Bash DEF
effects.description: Recovers 8% of missing HP when attacked by [Taunt] Targets.

effects.name: Shield Bash DEF
effects.description: [Reflection] deals additional 100% of own DEF as True DMG while in [Giant Shield Guardian] Status.
